name: Central Vietnam Heritage & Adventure Private Tour 9 days
duration: Places:Da Nang - Hoi An - My Son Sanctuary - Hue - Quang Binh - DMZ - Phong Nha
highlights: Take in the slow pace, stress-free atmosphere of Hoi An as wander around the old quarters filled with beautiful lanterns
Visit the mysterious ruins of My Son Sanctuary, the holy land of the Cham Kingdom, for an in-depth understanding of the Champa civilization
Feel the tranquility of Hue on a boat ride down the Perfume River as well as visit nearby ancient temples
Uncover the caverns and observe the breathtaking scenery in Phong Nha

itinerary.title: Da Nang Arrival - Transfer to Hoi An
itinerary.description:
Upon arrival at Da Nang Airport, you will be picked up by a private car and transferred to the hotel in Hoi An. Take the rest of the day to explore the old town with some activities such as wandering around the tơwn or joining our optional tours below:

Hoi An Motorbike Street Food Tour Half Day

	

FROM US $49 /pax




Hoi An Memories Show Ticket

	

FROM US $24 /pax

itinerary.title: My Son Sanctuary Half Day
itinerary.description:
Morning

Around 08:00, our tour guide will pick you up at the hotel lobby for a 1-hour private drive towards the My Son Sanctuary. During the half-day tour, we will explore this holy land in central Vietnam that was recognized by UNESCO as a World Cultural Heritage. Here, we can learn more about the history of the Champa Kingdom through visiting ruined temples. Next, we are given the chance to visit the Sa Huynh Champa Culture Museum in Tra Kieu. This museum displays a unique collection of artifacts which provides visitors with practical insights about the ancient Sa Huynh culture's inhabitant...

itinerary.title: Ba Na Hill Full Day
itinerary.description:
Morning

Around 07:45 - 08:00, you are picked up at the hotel to start your full-day tour exploring the spectacular Ba Na Hills which are called the “stairway to heaven”. Our morning today is packed with many fantastic activities. First, we need to check in at the Suoi Mo Cable Car Station and take a cable car to Marseille Station. Enjoy your cable car experience by looking out and taking in the breathtaking views of the mountains on the way. After that, we will meet the renowned Golden Bridge

itinerary.title: Transfer to Hue - City Tour
itinerary.description:
Morning

Around 08:00, you will be picked up at the hotel in Hoi An to get on the shuttle bus for the transfer to Hue. The ride might take about 3 hours so you can enjoy a lot of beautiful views on the way. Once arriving in the city, you will have the chance to visit the Ho Chi Minh Memorial House at 112 Mai Thuc Loan St where President Ho Chi Minh lived with his family from 1895 to 1901. Evening

You are free to enjoy the busy atmosphere on the street and the daily life of local people. You can consider our Hue Night Culinary Tour Half Day from your hotel to taste Hue's local foods

itinerary.title: Half-day Hue City Tour
itinerary.description:
Morning

From 08:00 to 08:15, our driver will transfer you from the hotel to the boat station. Your boat ride along the beautiful Perfume River will begin around 08:30 - 11:30, and here are the must-see sites on your list:

Visit the Thien Mu Pagoda, which has the most levels of any pagoda in all of Vietnam. Due to its prominent location, this Pagoda is frequently referred to as the symbol of Hue City in folk melodies. Next is the Imperial Citadel of Hue. With 520 hectares of walled enclosure housing Hue monuments, it is the biggest and most spectacular structure in contemporary Vietnam

itinerary.title: Hue - DMZ - Vinh Moc - Dong Hoi
itinerary.description:
Morning

After having breakfast at the hotel, you are transferred to DMZ by private car for approximately 3 hours. Upon arrival at DMZ, we will embark on an exploration of Vinh Moc Tunnels, a remarkable historical site constructed during the Vietnam War to protect the local population from intense bombing campaigns. It’s a testament to the endurance and bravery of the local population during a pivotal moment in Vietnam’s history. After the visit, have lunch at a local restaurant. Afternoon

Continue your journey by crossing the Ben Hai River, an important landmark in the partition of the count...

itinerary.title: Phong Nha Cave - Paradise Cave
itinerary.description:
Morning

You will be picked up by your driver and driven to Phong Nha National Park at 08:00. From the Ho Chi Minh Trail, take a leisurely boat ride along the Son River to the majestic Phong Nha Cave, which has been recognized as one of the world's longest and most beautiful karst caves. It is also listed as a UNESCO World Natural Heritage Site. Continue the cave discovery to the Bi Ky Chamber, the Fairy Lady, and the Royal Palace cave. These caves are renowned for their distinctive and stunning stalactites and stalagmites

itinerary.title: Free Day
itinerary.description: Day 8 of the tour is your free day. If you want to maximize your experience in Vietnam, you should look up other unique places in central Vietnam. You can contact our consultants to find some day tours that fit your preferences.

itinerary.title: Quang Binh Departure
itinerary.description: After you have breakfast at the hotel, our driver will transfer you to the airport for your departure flight by private car. BestPrice Travel wishes you had a wonderful time and hopes to see you on the next tour!

included: All transport within Vietnam (including airport pick up & see off)
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
Entrance fees for Vietnam attractions, as per itinerary
Meals as indicated in the program
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
